overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a wizard-robed character exploring a detailed gothic castle interior. The character ascends and descends spiral staircases, walks through sunlit corridors, and enters a common room adorned with red tapestries and medieval furnishings.

agents.ego_description: walking up the winding stone staircase following the curved wall

entered.detail: curved stone steps winding upward in a tight cylindrical tower
narrow arched window with stone tracery letting in daylight
medieval-style iron lantern mounted on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow stone spiral staircase within a cylindrical tower. Tall gothic windows and iron wall sconces line the curved stone walls as natural light filters in.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden paneled foyer with armor display

events.description: exits stone spiral staircase into wooden paneled foyer area

agents.ego_description: walking through the foyer past a suit of armor and ornate wooden furnishings

entered.detail: dark oak paneled walls with decorative moldings
large multi-paned windows with wooden frames letting in bright daylight
full suit of medieval armor standing in a stone alcove
large circular rug with intricate red and gold patterns
ornate carved wooden railing overlooking lower level
elaborate brass chandelier hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the staircase into a spacious wooden-paneled foyer. A suit of armor stands in an alcove to the left, while large stained glass windows illuminate the circular rug and brass chandelier.

scene_state.functional_zone: gryffindor common room with red tapestries

events.description: enters the common room through an arched stone doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room observing the decor and other students

notable_agents.action: student in blue robe sitting on leather couch reading
two students in black robes conversing near the fireplace

large stone fireplace with carved mantelpiece

vertical banners with house crests hanging from ceiling
brown leather armchairs arranged around the fireplace
suit of armor standing guard near the circular portal

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy common room with red tapestry-covered walls and a large stone fireplace. Students relax on leather armchairs while banners hang from the high ceiling, and a large circular portal stands at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone tunnel connecting common room to corridor

events.description: enters a narrow stone tunnel through the circular portal
approaches bright exit at the end of the dark tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark stone tunnel toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone blocks forming a narrow cylindrical passage
stone archway marking the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, dimly lit stone tunnel through the circular portal. The rough stone walls curve overhead as the character walks toward a bright exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic arched corridor with student benches

events.description: exits tunnel into long sunlit corridor with gothic vaulted ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking down the long corridor passing students sitting on benches

notable_agents.action: two students sitting on wooden bench conversing
student standing and observing a framed portrait on the wall

entered.detail: high ribbed stone vaulting with pointed arches
tall gothic windows casting long sunbeams across the floor
simple wooden benches placed along the corridor walls
framed portraits hanging on the wood-paneled walls
thick stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a grand corridor with a high gothic vaulted ceiling. Sunlight streams through tall arched windows, illuminating stone columns and students sitting on wooden benches along the walls.

events.description: turns onto upper balcony area with stone railing overlooking lower floor

agents.ego_description: walking along the balcony railing and descending the spiral staircase

notable_agents.action: character in dark robes standing near a stone pillar

entered.detail: ornate stone balustrade overlooking the lower level
curved stone staircase winding downward
decorative stone columns with carved capitals

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto an upper balcony with stone railings overlooking a lower level, then begins descending a spiral staircase. Ornate stone pillars line the path as the character moves downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor corridor with framed paintings

events.description: exits staircase into ground floor corridor with wooden paneling

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower corridor passing framed paintings on the walls

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking past the camera

entered.detail: dark wood paneled walls with decorative trim
large gilt-framed paintings hanging on the walls
wooden bench placed against the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character exits the staircase into a ground floor corridor with dark wood paneling. Large framed paintings, including one of a hippogriff, adorn the walls as the character walks past a wooden bench.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a gothic castle, transitioning from narrow stone towers and cozy common areas into grand vaulted halls and wood-paneled galleries. It begins with an ascent up a narrow stone spiral staircase illuminated by gothic windows before emerging into a spacious wooden-paneled foyer featuring a suit of armor and stained glass. The camera then moves through a cozy common room draped in red tapestries and past a large stone fireplace, passing through a circular portal into a dimly lit stone tunnel that leads toward a bright exit. As the character emerges into a grand corridor with high vaulted ceilings and sun-drenched columns, the path turns onto an upper balcony and descends another ornate spiral staircase. Finally, the scene shifts into a ground floor corridor of dark wood paneling, passing framed paintings of mythical creatures and wooden benches.
